cards.desc:
Dear Ali, 

‌

Hope you well!

‌

I need a video for website homepage, in this Video we need to start the video with a couple entering our office and received by reception then she will take them to VIP lounge, then a meeting with ma'am/sir or both, showing floorplan, and community details and signing papers to finalise the deal, then handing the key over mocktails or champagne.

‌

**Note**: Video has to be little slow around 5-6 minutes  

‌

Kindly plan this video on priority
cards.name: VIDEO FOR DRE WEBSITE DASHBOARD

cards.desc:
·        Dubai remains extremely competitive compared to its Peers whether on PSF, ROI, Capital Appreciation or Taxes

·        Apartment Prices Start from Only AED 550,000 at AED 900 PSF with Rental Yields Ranging from 6%–10% & Potential Capital Appreciation of Upto 10% Per Annum

·        Dubai also offers superior our Cash Flows which aligned to Construction Completion % there by minimizing your risk & maximizing your Return on Equity

·        They range from 50/50 No Post to upto 6 Years Post Completion

·        World Class Infrastructure, Political Stability, Highly Regulated Real Estate Market with World Class Amenities give Dubai the edge over its Peers

·        Zero Tax on Rentals, Capital Appreciation & Zero VAT with Residency Visa truly makes Dubai Unbeatable

·        Whether you’re looking for high returns or a premium lifestyle, Dubai offers the perfect balance of both.

·        Your ideal investment is just a click away.

·        DM Now – Link in Bio

🚨 _BIG NEWS : WE ARE NOW GOING EXCLUSIVE WITH BAYUT!_ 🚨

We have officially _TRIPLED_ our Bayut package, which means _MORE_ exposure, _MORE_ leads, and _MORE_ opportunities for every agent in DRE🔥

Here’s what’s coming your way:

✅ _Access to Seller Leads_
✅ _Double boosting for your listings_
✅ _Access to pre-approved buyers_
✅ _More deals directly from Bayut_
✅ _More TruBroker™ TruPoints_
✅ _Buy 1 Get 1 FREE on TruBroker™ Stories_

And that’s not all… 👀

🔥🔥_You now have the chance to be featured on the Bayut billboards you see across the streets of Dubai_ 🏙️🔥

🏆 The agent with the _HIGHEST TruPoints_ in the company will earn a spot on the billboard.

This is your time to shine, dominate the market, and build your personal brand bigger than ever before 🚀

Let’s level up together!

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions

cards.desc:
CONTENT ON ABUDHABI - MANN

‌

# UPDATED - ABUDHABI SCRIPT – FOR AI VIDEO 

A diversified economy with 54% non-oil contribution, driven by finance, tourism, and manufacturing.

Manufacturing is driven by petrochemicals, metals, food processing, and pharmaceuticals.

Were Tourism is driven by Disney World, MGM Grand gaming, and the Guggenheim Museum and more.

**ABU DHABI** Is the 4th largest global state investor, managing USD 2.93 trillion in assets.

Were population of 4 million continues to outpace supply.

And occupied residential units grew by 6.6% from 2022–2025, compared to supply growth of 2.8%.

Here in Abu Dhabi… Saadiyat, Yas and Al Reem are 3 well-established islands providing an excellent lifestyle.

And Now Expanding great investment opportunities With Upcoming developments on Yas Canal and beachfront destinations

Prices for apartments in ABU DHABI start from AED 1 million;

townhouses from AED 4.5 million.

Also, You can benefit from flexible 50/50 or 35/65 payment plans and ALD waivers.

Explore Abu Dhabi’s latest opportunities with DRE Homes — contact us today. Link in bio

cards.desc:
**SCRIPT WHICH WILL APPEAL TO INTERNATIONAL BUYERS:**

·        Dubai remains extremely competitive compared to its Peers whether on PSF, ROI, Capital Appreciation or Taxes

·        Apartment Prices Start from Only AED 550,000 at AED 900 PSF with Rental Yields Ranging from 6%–10% & Potential Capital Appreciation of Upto 10% Per Annum

·        Dubai also offers superior our Cash Flows which aligned to Construction Completion % there by minimizing your risk & maximizing your Return on Equity

·        They range from 50/50 No Post to upto 6 Years Post Completion

·        World Class Infrastructure, Political Stability, Highly Regulated Real Estate Market with World Class Amenities give Dubai the edge over its Peers

·        Zero Tax on Rentals, Capital Appreciation & Zero VAT with Residency Visa truly makes Dubai Unbeatable

·        Whether you’re looking for high returns or a premium lifestyle, Dubai offers the perfect balance of both.

·        Your ideal investment is just a click away.

·        DM Now – Link in Bio

‌

cards.desc:
SCRIPT DONE

NOW EDITING - SCRIPT DONE PENDING EDIT

‌

‌

Townhouses make up 12–13% of total planned units

There is a scarcity of undeveloped land for new townhouse projects.

**Dubai has seen an influx of Families due to Golden Visa**

Townhouse Prices to Rent & Own are still 30-40% Lower than 3 & 4 Bedroom Apartments

This leaves a Scope for Capital Appreciation & High ROI & a surge in Demand making it a sought after Investment

**The Government is driving Infrastructure Growth through** the Expansion of

Al Maktoum International Airport of AED 128 billion ($35 billion)

Dubai Metro Extension connectivity of AED 103 billion ($28 billion)

EXPO CITY region's largest MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions) venue.

Etihad Rail Nationwide Railway Network

**Townhouse Prices Range from AED 2M to 4.2M** with Flexible payment plans from **20/80 to 75/25**, **4%** DLD Waivers & Discounts

The Plot Sizes Range from **1,300 – 2,000 Sq. Ft, with Spacious** Built-Up Areas from **1,900 – 2,800 Sq. Ft.**

**It doesn’t get better than this.**
**Reach out today to secure your townhouse opportunity in Dubai. DM NOW**
